title: SeasonStuff
description: this mod add wery nice winer cloths and decorations
body:
This mod adds snowshoes, skates, scarves, hats and sweaters. a Christmas tree and lots of decorations for it. need [curios api](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios), [moonlight lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight), [snowy spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/snowy-spirit), [Rainbow Christmas](https://modrinth.com/mod/rainbow-christmas/versions?g=1.20.1) and [cold sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat). 

Snowshoes make you go faster on snow
![snowshoes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/975d664cd7274de70e44af82d2552e2c75c87192.png)
Skates speed you up on ice, but slow you down on other surfaces.
![skates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34ca860625cb4bd69da5a1e167407380673b0321.png)
scarves, winter hat, sweaters keep you warm in winter biomes!
![stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5892c921736e81d6348acfda54ca64cea67fc54b.jpeg)
colors: Hat - red, white, blue.
Scarves - red, white, blue.
Sweaters - red, green, blue and white.

Christams tree - you can found it in the forest!
![tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4d11f68cad64836641e6d376d76d3307553729f_0.webp)
Christams tree - with garlands!
![tree ch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43ec15d937e6fd3b59e66f1162fa002ad11bd2b6.png)

Christmas bell - craft
![bell craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a3b897403fd8bd05b892fabc1c144461c8d5b56_0.webp)
Christmas Garlands
![garlands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a6408ee73c2980fec3b95b499f8ea92b3e09882.png)
Christmas socks
![Socks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/542722f3c010427d84b1c2c4d7599c40684d58c4.png)

enjoy!
